rationale: No qualitative change in any situation directly affecting Poland; Iran deal remains stalled, Ukraine war continues without new escalation, all baselines continue decaying.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: The Iran nuclear deal stalemate continues with no breakthrough, keeping mild energy price uncertainty alive for Poland. No structural change from prior cycle.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: European defence autonomy debate is relevant to Poland as a NATO frontline state, but this is a long-term structural discussion with no immediate policy change affecting Polish security.

top_events.title: Anti-immigrant unrest in Belfast
top_events.summary: Riots in Belfast are geographically distant and have no direct bearing on Poland's migration or security situation. Minor indirect relevance as EU migration sentiment story.
